note: Batch 8 — bulk-mix recipes (batched cocktail mixes, syrups, infusions, and pre-batched service mixes). Bulk mixes carry no glassware, garnish, photo, or variants; they are identified by a non-empty yield and/or a non-empty equipment array. This note is a human comment and is silently ignored by the importer.

recipes.title: Batched Negroni Service Mix
recipes.subtitle: Pre-batched stirred service pour, 750 mL yield
assembly: Combine gin, Campari, and vermouth in a 1 L glass bottle.
Add filtered water to target 22% ABV dilution for service.
Seal, invert gently three times to integrate — do not shake.
Label, date, and refrigerate at 34–38°F for up to 14 days.
Pour 3 oz over a large rock in a rocks glass at service; express one orange peel over the top and discard.
qualityIdentifier: Taste: balanced bitter-sweet, no spirit burn

recipes.title: Honey Syrup (2:1)
recipes.subtitle: Standard 2:1 honey-to-water bar syrup
assembly: Combine water and honey in a non-reactive saucepan.
Warm over low heat, whisking until fully dissolved — do not boil.
Strain through a fine-mesh chinois into a clean container.
Cool to room temperature before bottling.
Cover, label, and store at 34–38°F for up to 30 days.
qualityIdentifier: Taste: clean honey, no caramel notes

recipes.title: Pineapple Gum Syrup
recipes.subtitle: Gum arabic–stabilized pineapple syrup for tropical builds
assembly: Whisk gum arabic into strained pineapple juice; hydrate 30 minutes.
Combine juice mixture and sugar in a saucepan over low heat.
Stir until sugar dissolves; hold at 140°F for 10 minutes — do not simmer.
Add cream of tartar, stir to combine, and remove from heat.
Strain through a super-fine chinois into a sanitized bottle.
Cover, label, and store at 34–38°F for up to 21 days.
qualityIdentifier: Viscosity: coats a spoon, slow drip
Taste: bright pineapple, no raw gum starchiness

recipes.title: Cold Brew Coffee Concentrate
recipes.subtitle: 18-hour cold steep concentrate for coffee cocktails
assembly: Charge a cold brew tower with 4 L filtered water at 40°F.
Add coarse-ground coffee evenly across the bed; do not tamp.
Steep undisturbed at 38–42°F for 18 hours.
Drain concentrate through a paper filter-lined chinois.
Transfer to sanitized keg; pressurize at 12 PSI with nitrogen blend.
Label, date, and hold at 36°F for up to 10 days.
qualityIdentifier: Taste: clean, low bitterness, no oxidation

recipes.title: Spiced Demerara Service Mix
recipes.subtitle: Pre-batched spiced old-fashioned service pour, 1 L yield
assembly: Toast whole allspice, clove, and cinnamon in a dry pan until fragrant; cool.
Combine rum, apple brandy, spiced syrup, and bitters in a 1 L bottle.
Add toasted spices and seal; rest 24 hours refrigerated to infuse.
Strain out spices through a fine chinois into a clean bottle.
Add filtered water to target 24% ABV dilution for service.
Cover, label, and store at 34–38°F for up to 21 days.
Pour 3 oz over a large rock; express one orange peel over the top and discard.
qualityIdentifier: Taste: warm spice, balanced sweetness, no spirit burn
Visual: clear amber, no spice sediment
